# full

https://github.com/leodido/structcli/examples/full

> A demonstration of the structcli library with beautiful CLI features

## Commands

- [full](#full): A demonstration of the structcli library with beautiful CLI features
- [full preset](#full-preset): Demonstrate that flagpreset aliases are syntactic sugar and still flow through Transform and Validate
- [full srv](#full-srv): Start the server with the specified configuration
- [full srv version](#full-srv-version): Print version information
- [full usr add](#full-usr-add): Add a new user to the system with the specified details

## full

A demonstration of the structcli library with beautiful CLI features

### Flags

- `--dry` (bool, default: false): -
- `--verbose` (count, default: 0): -

### Environment Variables

- `FULL_DRYRUN`: maps to `--dry`
- `FULL_DRY`: maps to `--dry`

## full preset

Demonstrate that flagpreset aliases are syntactic sugar and still flow through Transform and Validate

### Flags

- `--label` (string): -
- `--role` (string): -

## full srv

Start the server with the specified configuration

### Flags

- `--advertise-cidr` (ipNet, default: 127.0.0.0/24): Advertised service subnet (CIDR)
- `--apikey` (string): API authentication key
- `--bind-ip` (ip, default: 127.0.0.1): Bind interface IP
- `--bind-mask` (ipMask, default: ffffff00): Bind interface mask
- `--database.maxconns` (int, default: 10): Max database connections
- `--db-url` (string): Database connection URL
- `--deep-setting` (string, default: default-deep-setting): -
- `--deep.deeper.nodefault` (string): -
- `--deeper-setting` (string, default: default-deeper-setting): -
- `--host` (string, default: localhost): Server host
- `--log-file` (string): Log file path
- `--log-level` (zapcore.Level, default: info): Set log level
- `--port` (int, default: 0, required): Server port
- `--target-env` (string, default: dev): Set the target environment
- `--token-base64` (bytesBase64, default: aGVsbG8=): Token bytes encoded as base64
- `--token-hex` (bytesHex, default: 68656c6c6f): Token bytes encoded as hex
- `--trusted-peers` (ipSlice, default: 127.0.0.2,127.0.0.3): Trusted peer IPs (comma separated)

### Environment Variables

- `FULL_SRV_ADVERTISECIDR`: maps to `--advertise-cidr`
- `FULL_SRV_ADVERTISE_CIDR`: maps to `--advertise-cidr`
- `FULL_SRV_APIKEY`: maps to `--apikey`
- `FULL_SRV_BINDIP`: maps to `--bind-ip`
- `FULL_SRV_BIND_IP`: maps to `--bind-ip`
- `FULL_SRV_BINDMASK`: maps to `--bind-mask`
- `FULL_SRV_BIND_MASK`: maps to `--bind-mask`
- `FULL_SRV_DATABASE_MAXCONNS`: maps to `--database.maxconns`
- `FULL_SRV_LOGFILE`: maps to `--log-file`
- `FULL_SRV_LOG_FILE`: maps to `--log-file`
- `FULL_SRV_PORT`: maps to `--port`
- `FULL_SRV_TOKENBASE64`: maps to `--token-base64`
- `FULL_SRV_TOKEN_BASE64`: maps to `--token-base64`
- `FULL_SRV_TOKENHEX`: maps to `--token-hex`
- `FULL_SRV_TOKEN_HEX`: maps to `--token-hex`
- `FULL_SRV_TRUSTEDPEERS`: maps to `--trusted-peers`
- `FULL_SRV_TRUSTED_PEERS`: maps to `--trusted-peers`

## full srv version

Print version information

### Flags

- `--dry` (bool, default: false): -
- `--verbose` (count, default: 0): -

### Environment Variables

- `FULL_DRYRUN`: maps to `--dry`
- `FULL_DRY`: maps to `--dry`

## full usr add

Add a new user to the system with the specified details

### Flags

- `--age` (int, default: 0): User age
- `--dry` (bool, default: false): -
- `--email` (string): User email
- `--name` (string): User name
- `--verbose` (count, default: 0): -

### Environment Variables

- `FULL_DRYRUN`: maps to `--dry`
- `FULL_DRY`: maps to `--dry`

## Optional

- [JSON Schema](#json-schema): Machine-readable schema available via `full --jsonschema`
